title: rosa × dumetorum f. chapusii
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. chapusii, also known as the Chapuis' Rosa, is a hybrid of the Rosa dumetorum and Rosa rubiginosa, a type of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum f. chapusii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
